data.text: P04 A FELISIAN WORLD. BLUISH REFLECTIVITY. HAS A SMALL DEBRIS RING.
003.069 WAS A LANDING ON A GRASSY SLOPE WITH SHRUBS AND BUSHES,
INVESTIGATION REVEALED THERE WAS A CRATER AT THE TOP OF THE SLOPE
WITH A DOME OF GROUND WITHIN. 307.48 WAS A GRASSY ISLAND WITH
A SMALL HARBOR AND ANOTHER SMALLER ISLAND TO THE NORTH. 018.060 WAS
VERY HILLY AND RUGGED GROUND. PRO 0.165.960; PRV 0.097.464.952
